cond.es: Tras recuperar SP con skills, Akekuri gana ATK +10% por 10s.
cond.en: After recovering SP with skills, Akekuri gains ATK +10% for 10s.

cond.es: Ultimate SQUAD! ON ME! mejorada: mientras la ultimate está activa, todo el equipo gana ATK +10%.
cond.en: Ultimate SQUAD! ON ME! improved: While ultimate is active, entire team gains ATK +10%.

cond.es: M2: Agility +10, Intellect +10.
cond.en: M2: Agility +10, Intellect +10.

cond.es: Combo skill Auger Angling mejorada: tras pescar un Rare Fin, todo el equipo gana ATK +15% por 10s.
cond.en: Combo skill Auger Angling improved: After catching a Rare Fin, the entire team gains ATK +15% for 10s.

alesh.assumeIdeal: Rare Fin garantizado en cada combo (escenario ideal del timeline)

cond.es: M2: Strength +15, Intellect +15.
cond.en: M2: Strength +15, Intellect +15.

cond.es: Ultimate Overclocked Moment: aplica Electric Amp +20% y Heat Amp +20% a todo el equipo por 12s. La keystone Arts Talent sube el Amp a 1.1x (~22%).
cond.en: Ultimate Overclocked Moment: applies Electric Amp +20% and Heat Amp +20% to the entire team for 12s. Keystone Arts Talent increases the Amp to 1.1x (~22%).

cond.es: La battle skill aplica Focus; un enemigo con Focus sufre Electric Susceptibility +10% y Heat Susceptibility +10%. La keystone High Specs Tech Tester suma +4% a cada uno tras 20s (~14%). Focus solo afecta a 1 enemigo a la vez.
cond.en: Battle skill applies Focus; a Focused enemy suffers Electric Susceptibility +10% and Heat Susceptibility +10%. Keystone High Specs Tech Tester adds +4% each after 20s (~14%). Focus only on 1 enemy at a time.

cond.es: M1: el Amp de Overclocked Moment sube a 1.1x el original → +2% Electric Amp y +2% Heat Amp extra mientras dura la ultimate (12s).
cond.en: M1: Overclocked Moment's Amp is increased to 1.1x the original → extra +2% Electric Amp and +2% Heat Amp while the ultimate lasts (12s).

cond.es: M4: Intellect +10. El Max HP +10% queda fuera del cálculo de daño.
cond.en: M4: Intellect +10. The Max HP +10% is not part of the damage calculation.

cond.es: M5: Electric y Heat Susceptibility +4% extra (10% → 14%) durante 40s — la cola de la ventana de Focus, tras 20s de Focus sostenido.
cond.en: M5: extra Electric and Heat Susceptibility +4% (10% → 14%) for 40s — the tail of the Focus window, after 20s of sustained Focus.

cond.es: Tras activar el efecto adicional del battle skill 3 veces: equipo gana Electric DMG Dealt +0.08% por punto de Intellect (123 → +9.84%), 15s, no acumulable
cond.en: After triggering the battle skill's additional effect 3 times: team gains Electric DMG Dealt +0.08% per Intellect point (123 → +9.84%), 15s, cannot stack

cond.es: M2: Agility +15, Intellect +15. (El +15 INT también sube Wildland Trekker a +11.04%, aún no incluido en el cálculo.)
cond.en: M2: Agility +15, Intellect +15. (The +15 INT also raises Wildland Trekker to +11.04%, not yet included in the calculation.)

cond.es: Battle skill Dolly Rush: si el objetivo tiene Corrosion, la consume y aplica Physical Susceptibility +20% y Arts Susceptibility +20% por 30s. La keystone Dolly Paradise suma +8% a ambas (~28%).
cond.en: Battle skill Dolly Rush: if the target has Corrosion, consume it and apply Physical Susceptibility +20% and Arts Susceptibility +20% for 30s. Keystone Dolly Paradise adds +8% to both (~28%).

cond.es: M1: la Physical y Arts Susceptibility de Dolly Rush suben +8% cada una (20% → 28%). Misma ventana que el buff base.
cond.en: M1: Dolly Rush's Physical and Arts Susceptibility are increased by +8% each (20% → 28%). Same window as the base buff.

cond.es: M5: el DMG multiplier de Eruption Column (combo) sube a 1.2x el original. El CD -2s sí entra; la duración de Corrosion +4s no está incluida en el cálculo.
cond.en: M5: Eruption Column's (combo) DMG multiplier is increased to 1.2x the original. The CD -2s is included; the Corrosion duration +4s is not included in the calculation.

cond.en: Will +15, Electric DMG Dealt +8%.

cond.en: Battle skill Ascending Strike, combo skill Soar to the Stars, and ultimate Blade Gale improved: DMG Multiplier is increased to 1.1 times the

cond.es: Talent Reduce and Thicken: al consumir Vulnerability, Physical DMG Dealt = [stacks consumidos × 6%] por 10s (hasta 4 stacks, +24% al máx). El nivel se DERIVA del nº de stacks consumidos (no se asume).
cond.en: Talent Reduce and Thicken: on consuming Vulnerability, Physical DMG Dealt = [stacks consumed × 6%] for 10s (up to 4 stacks, +24% at max). The level is DERIVED from the stacks consumed (not assumed).

cond.en: Strength +15, Physical DMG Dealt +8%.

Inerte en Rotación a propósito; toggle/techo manual en el calc de Daño (como mifu-2/rossi-5).

cond.en: Fluorite gains DMG Dealt +10/20% against Slowed targets.

cond.es: Ultimate: los enemigos en el Anomalous Gravity Field sufren Arts Susceptibility +30% base, +3% más por cada stack activo de Vulnerability (hasta ~42% con la keystone Wind Walker = +1 stack de Vuln, máx 4). Arts Susceptibility amplifica TODO el daño Arts = no-físico (heat/cryo/electric/nature/aether) de TODO el equipo → por eso Gilberta es S+ (solo no toca daño físico).
cond.en: Ultimate: enemies in the Anomalous Gravity Field suffer Arts Susceptibility +30% base, increased +3% per active Vulnerability stack (up to ~42% with keystone Wind Walker = +1 Vuln stack, max 4). Arts Susceptibility amplifies ALL Arts (non-physical: heat/cryo/electric/nature/aether) damage from the WHOLE team → this is why Gilberta is S+ (she only misses physical damage).

pogranichnik.pendingModel: Fervent Morale requiere DOS primitivos nuevos, ninguno verificable sin captura del juego: (1) trigger onSpRecover con UMBRAL de 80 SP acumulados (el onSpRecover actual dispara por-skill sin umbral → sobre-contaría los stacks); (2) Arts Intensity DISPARADA por ventana (hoy artsInt es solo build-fold estático — buffsAt no la acumula y el daño de reacción la lee estática, rotation.js:479/627/1712). Modelo intención: por cada 80 SP recuperados con skills propias → ATK +8% y AI +8 por 20s, apila a 3 (stackCap, duración por-stack separada). Inerte en Rotación a propósito. El valor 0.08 es POR-STACK (correcto para el stackCap futuro, NO hornear el techo aquí o habría que revertirlo al implementar el trigger): el toggle del calc de Daño muestra +8% (sub-representa el techo real ×3 = +24% ATK + AI 24, pendiente).

cond.es: Talent The Living Banner: al recuperar 80 SP con skills propias, Fervent Morale por 20s (ATK +8% y Arts Intensity +8), apila hasta máx 3 stacks (duración por stack separada). Aún no incluido en el cálculo.
cond.en: Talent The Living Banner: on recovering 80 SP with own skills, Fervent Morale for 20s (ATK +8% and Arts Intensity +8), stacks up to 3 (each stack's duration counted separately). Not yet included in the calculation.

cond.en: M1: the combo's Physical Susceptibility is increased by a further +5% (5% → 10%) with the extended 20s window; the calculation under-counts the base +5%'s extra tail. The combo cooldown reduction is not included.

cond.en: Each skill-heal grants 1 stack of Heat DMG Dealt for 40s (max 5). Wearer +4%/stack: the calculation splits it as 3% self + 1% team (the wearer adds both). Every combo heals via Hunter of Transgression.

camille.assumeIdeal: cada combo cura (Firefang Vesperwings en vuelo — escenario ideal del timeline)

cond.es: Los demás operadores ganan el 25% del efecto: Heat DMG Dealt +1%/stack (máx 5, 40s).
cond.en: Other operators gain 25% of the effect: Heat DMG Dealt +1%/stack (max 5, 40s).

camille.assumeIdeal: cada combo cura (Firefang Vesperwings en vuelo — escenario ideal del timeline)

cond.es: M5: el boost por stack de Bloodfount Revival sube +6% (4% → 10%/stack al portador). Modelado 4.5% self + 1.5% team extra por stack.
cond.en: M5: Bloodfount Revival's per-stack boost is increased by +6% (4% → 10%/stack for the wearer). Modeled as extra 4.5% self + 1.5% team per stack.

cond.es: M5: la parte de equipo del boost sube +1.5%/stack (1% → 2.5%/stack para los demás).
cond.en: M5: the team share of the boost increases by +1.5%/stack (1% → 2.5%/stack for others).

camille.pendingModel: duración de la Heat Susceptibility no está en la data (el stat del skill no trae Duration) → sin ventana derivable en el sim; toggle/techo en el calc de Daño.

cond.es: La battle skill aplica Heat Susceptibility +7% (rank 12). La keystone M1 Flame-Anointed Lance suma +5% (entrada aparte). Weakness es defensivo (fuera del cálculo).
cond.en: The battle skill applies Heat Susceptibility +7% (rank 12). Keystone M1 Flame-Anointed Lance adds +5% (separate entry). Weakness is defensive (outside the calculation).

camille.pendingModel: misma ventana desconocida que camille-2 (la duración de la Susceptibility no está en la data); toggle/techo en el calc.

cond.es: M1: la battle skill aplica Heat Susceptibility +5% adicional (7% → 12%). La Weakness +5% es defensiva (fuera del cálculo).
cond.en: M1: the battle skill applies an additional Heat Susceptibility +5% (7% → 12%). The Weakness +5% is defensive (outside the calculation).

cond.es: M2: Agility +20, Intellect +20.
cond.en: M2: Agility +20, Intellect +20.

cond.es: M3: el DMG Multiplier de Heartstake Thorn y Hunter Pursuit sube a 1.3x (combo). El CD -2s y el SP x1.15 no están incluidos en el cálculo.
cond.en: M3: Heartstake Thorn and Hunter Pursuit DMG Multipliers increased to 1.3x (combo). The CD -2s and SP x1.15 are not included in the calculation.

cond.es: INT: el combo aplica Nature Susceptibility +4% y Cryo Susceptibility +4% por 4s. Golpear al enemigo bajo Imprisonment con la battle aplica OTRA instancia (2s) — las instancias acumulan; el cálculo incluye solo la del combo.
cond.en: INT: the combo applies Nature Susceptibility +4% and Cryo Susceptibility +4% for 4s. Hitting the Imprisoned enemy with the battle skill applies ANOTHER instance (2s) — instances stack; the calculation includes only the combo one.

cond.es: WILL: el combo aplica Nature Susceptibility +4% y Cryo Susceptibility +4% base por 6s. El atributo Will suma hasta +7/7.5/8% extra (560/600/640 de Will para el máx, por rango) — no horneado. M1 Watcher of the Sea: +6% extra.
cond.en: WILL: the combo applies Nature Susceptibility +4% and Cryo Susceptibility +4% base for 6s. The Will attribute adds up to +7/7.5/8% extra (560/600/640 Will for the max, by rank) — not baked in. M1 Watcher of the Sea: extra +6%.

cond.es: E2, INT: durante la ultimate, Arcane gana Arts Amp +24%. M5 Homeward Glance suma +16% (→40%).
cond.en: E2, INT: during the ultimate, Arcane gains Arts Amp +24%. M5 Homeward Glance adds +16% (→40%).

arcane.pendingModel: magnitud = Will × 0.02% (cap 12.8%): escala por atributo del BUILD via attrScale (value 0 = no hornear el techo). El calc de Daño YA lo resuelve (enemyDeb, 2026-07-16); la ROTACIÓN aún no consume attrScale → inerte ahí a propósito.

cond.es: E2, WILL: cuando seq 1 (Gloompurger Array) y seq 2 (Gloompurge Arcana) de la ultimate dañan, aplican [Will × 0.02%] Nature y Cryo Susceptibility (máx 12.8%) por 10s. No acumula.
cond.en: E2, WILL: when ultimate sequence 1 (Gloompurger Array) and sequence 2 (Gloompurge Arcana) deal DMG, they apply [Will × 0.02%] Nature and Cryo Susceptibility (max 12.8%) for 10s. Cannot stack.

arcane.pendingModel: toggle de TECHO solo para el calc de Daño (SIN gate a propósito → inerte en la Rotación: allí la Corrosión forzada la aplica el primitivo forces de inflictions.json con su rampa exacta; un anchor aquí la doble-contaría).

cond.es: INT: la ultimate fuerza Corrosion nv1 por 25s (15 base + 10 de Weapon Honing E3). Valor = TECHO de la rampa: 12% nv1 × 1.1 del talento = 13.2% de reducción de resistencia (la rampa real sube 3.96→13.2 en ~10s). Herencia: si cubre una Corrosion de nivel alto conserva ese nivel (hasta 24% × 1.1). M3 Wielder of Stone: +5s y tope ×1.3 (15.6%).
cond.en: INT: the ultimate forces level-1 Corrosion for 25s (15 base + 10 from Weapon Honing E3). Value = ramp CEILING: 12% at level 1 × 1.1 from the talent = 13.2% resistance reduction (the real ramp climbs 3.96→13.2 over ~10s). Inheritance: covering a higher-level Corrosion keeps that level (up to 24% × 1.1). M3 Wielder of Stone: +5s and ×1.3 cap (15.6%).

cond.es: M1: el DMG Multiplier de Yinglung Stance IV sube a 1.3x (combo). No incluido en el cálculo: INT +10 SP al golpear bajo Imprisonment; WILL +6% de Susceptibility.
cond.en: M1: Yinglung Stance IV DMG Multiplier increased to 1.3x (combo). Not included in the calculation: INT +10 SP on hitting under Imprisonment; WILL +6% Susceptibility.

cond.es: M2: Intellect +15, Will +15, Arts Intensity +16.
cond.en: M2: Intellect +15, Will +15, Arts Intensity +16.

cond.es: M5, INT: durante la ultimate, Arts Amp +16% extra (24% → 40% con Tactical Planning 2). El x1.3 de Gloompurge Arcana no está incluido en el cálculo (aplica solo a la secuencia 2 de la ult).
cond.en: M5, INT: during the ultimate, extra Arts Amp +16% (24% → 40% with Tactical Planning 2). Gloompurge Arcana's x1.3 is not included in the calculation (it only applies to the ult's sequence 2).

cond.es: M5, WILL: las Susceptibility de la ultimate (Tactical Planning 2) suben +7% extra. El CD -30% del combo tras la secuencia 2 no está incluido en el cálculo.
cond.en: M5, WILL: the ultimate's Susceptibility (Tactical Planning 2) increased by an extra +7%. The combo's CD -30% after sequence 2 is not included in the calculation.
